strengths: Extensive hard skills including Java, JavaScript, Python, SQL, C++, React.js, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, Spring Boot, OpenCV, fastAPI, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQLite, DynamoDB, Oracle SQL, Git, GitHub, Vercel, AWS (EC2, ECS, ECR, Cognito), Docker, Maven, Jira provide a strong foundation for software development roles.
Exposure to both front-end and back-end technologies (React, Node, Express, Spring Boot) positions the candidate for full-stack roles.
Experience with cloud deployment (AWS, Vercel) and databases (SQL, NoSQL) make the candidate appealing.
Soft skills like project management, collaboration, and UI/UX design can be highlighted to demonstrate well-roundedness.

gaps.action: Prioritize roles that do not require years of experience, as the job market is open to junior roles.
Complete a course on React Native or Kotlin (e.g., Udemy, Coursera) and build a simple mobile app to demonstrate proficiency.
Complete the free TypeScript handbook at typescriptlang.org (~8 hrs) and convert one existing JS project to TS.

gaps.skill: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science or related field
gaps.action: Long-term: Seneca's degree completion pathway or Athabasca University's online CS degree are options — or prioritize roles that accept diplomas + experience

uniqueValue: Proficiency in a wide array of technologies including Java, Python, JavaScript, and various frameworks which shows adaptability and a broad skill set.
Familiarity with both SQL and NoSQL databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, DynamoDB, SQLite, Oracle SQL) showcases versatility in data management.
Experience with deployment on AWS and Vercel and tools like Docker and CI/CD (GitHub Actions) makes the candidate valuable in modern development environments.
